description: SURPRISE: at shipped threshold 0.3 entropy leaks 33% of diffuse cases (D1=.275,D6=.287 fall below) -> calibration failure, matches lit 2603.06317. At calibrated 0.225-0.275 -> 0% (confirm).
entropy-OFF (ablated) commits all diffuse cases -> 100% false commit; no hard branch catches diffuse soft uncertainty. Entropy IS load-bearing in this regime.
SURPRISE: not equivalent. Calibrated entropy STRICTLY DOMINATES count>=2 (0%/0% vs 0%/33% over-escalation): weighting separates diffuse-doubt(D>=.275) from minor-pileup(W<=.20), a count cannot.
NON-circular: τ tuned on calib half, materiality GT independent of weights. Held-out: weighted 98.3% vs count 78.3% vs ablated-off 28.3%. Weighting encodes materiality, generalizes.
bench headline 86%/0%/22% INVARIANT across τ in {0.1,0.2,0.3,0.5,0.9}. Entropy decorative on realistic load is robust to the knob.
Corrupting model self-report defeats only 1/6 (fraud_risk, the lone self-report-only defense); 5/6 survive via independent verifiers. Trust boundary = extraction layer.
Corrupting verifier/extraction layer defeats 4/6 -> guarantee reduces to extraction integrity (as any gate). Honest limitation + design rule: re-derive, never self-report.
NON-CIRCULAR spine. n=36k/point, Wilson CI<1pt. Graceful linear decay: ~2% false-commit at 10% emission infidelity (not a cliff).
SURPRISE: channels not equal at full corruption. extract 38.9% vs emit 22.2% -> more defenses on extract channel; redundant cases (7/18) immune to single-channel corruption.
